content: We can frame Self-Refine’s iterative unguided refinement pipeline as a concrete operational base to ground the multiple inconsistent perspectives that LLM self-reflection mechanisms rely on, creating a new framework for multi-perspective self-refinement that requires no external supervision or training data. This hybrid approach leverages Self-Refine’s strength in unguided iteration to eliminate the need for curated contrast datasets that many existing LLM self-reflection methods depend on.
